title: Explore Decorate Create
description:
Modpack designed to make more interesting:
- Exploration
- Decoration
- Creation
body:
# Explore Decorate Create

### *A mod by*
![Rupyber Studios Logo](https://rupyberstudios.github.io/website/img/rupyber_studios.png)

### Play with friends!

This modpack can be used for singleplayer, but also contains many mods that aim to improve performance and is also perfect for multiplayer.

### Explore

It contains many mods that make exploration even more exciting, adding structures and even dimensions!

### Decorate

There are many mods that make decoration easier and more satisfacting, adding fancy beds, fornitures, doors and many many more...

### Create

The modpack makes you want to build beautiful creations in wonderful places and helps you to become a skilled builder!

## Visit our [Website](https://rupyberstudios.github.io/website/)!

![Explore Decorate Create Logo](https://rupyberstudios.github.io/website/img/explore_decorate_create.png)
